name: NeededPlus: Overhaul
description: V3 pack structured into brewing/ and crafting/ folders. Adds spirits, sodas, vinegar, tinctures, stills and bottling gear, chem drying, energy synergies, recycler expansions, and itemgroup merges. No mapgen. Updated to v0.3: integrated brewing/crafting/itemgroups. v0.4: hydroponics, materials/polymers 2.0, power distribution & safety added. v0.4.5a: Color normalization (lt*/dk* → light_*/dark_*) + realistic pricing (base & post-apoc). v0.4.5b: Glassmaking now integrates vanilla glass — craft bottle_glass, jar_glass, sheet_glass from batch; NP lab glass can use vanilla sheet/bottles as input. v0.4.5c: Vanilla bridges — added soft-addition recipes that let mod items craft vanilla gear (distillation kit, chemistry set, glue, detergent, antiseptic, sealed jars, lamp oil) + safe spawns. v0.4.5d: Mirrored itemgroups/ into item_groups/ (duplicates for compatibility). v0.4.5e: Consolidated all custom item groups into one file (item_groups/NeededPlus_itemgroups_all.json); kept vanilla merges separate (item_groups/vanilla_patches/vanilla_merges_all.json). v0.4.5f: Consolidated item groups into one file; vanilla merges kept separate.
